boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on environment and release condition
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MATCH-PAX25-H03 requires exact bind of closed_environment, closed_release_condition to requested values
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Mismatch blocks queue release per matching standard
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-PAX25-H03 closed values do not bind to ACT-PAX25-H03 requested values

final_answer: Source records reveal ACT-PAX25-H03 requests environment production inventory sync environment with release condition RC-4, while DEP-PAX25-H03 shows closed_environment inventory validation readiness environment with closed_release_condition VAL-INV-4. Per MATCH-PAX25-H03, exact binding of these values is required before queue release. The mismatch blocks activation. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed.
open_blockers: environment mismatch: production inventory sync environment vs inventory validation readiness environment
release condition mismatch: RC-4 vs VAL-INV-4
